summary.decision: Historical capability/cost claims are usable only when tied to DSXU owner evidence plus latest public challenge route/cost/cache/trajectory evidence; deferred rows remain blocked.

rows.capability: DSXU CLI = DeepSeek V4 Code/Terminal orchestration enhancer
rows.contribution: Supports the coding/terminal workflow; useful as product capability, but not a standalone cost optimization claim.
rows.publicClaim: S00 can support a DSXU-owned baseline-workflow claim when cited with owner evidence and latest live/public-challenge metrics.
rows.releaseUse: Allowed as DSXU-owned release-candidate capability evidence; public benchmark superiority still requires fixed raw comparison.

rows.contribution: Directly reduces spend or controls expensive model/tool behavior in the main workflow.
